name: Mine Defender
short_description: Fight with AI-controlled drones, explore the mine and extract resources, upgrade your base and plan your defense. Protect your mine
detailed_description:
Go on an expedition to a distant planet, extract resources from mine and upgrade your base. But be careful, you are not the only one who claims them. Defend yourself from waves of drones controlled by local AI. Upgrade your base and plan your defense. In between battles, explore the procedurally generated mine and extract resources to upgrade your base.

Explore the mine

Drill tunnels under the base using a special drone and look for valuable resources to upgrade your base, but do not forget to watch the surface.

Develop

Improve your base, open new buildings, use resources wisely, they are limited. Increase your chances of survival

Fight

Take control of five guns, build autonomous turrets, use all means to repel another attack
